description.ko: 미래지향적인 기계 장치와 기하학적 왜곡 및 디지털 아티팩트의 혼돈스러운 정밀함이 만나는 KURO-X의 시각적으로 강렬한 묘사입니다.
description.en: A visually arresting depiction of KURO-X where futuristic machinery meets the chaotic precision of geometric distortion and digital artifacts.

prompt: KURO-X futuristic robotic character, sleek black matte armor, geometric glitch art style, digital distortion, shattered vector shapes, pixel sorting effects, neon cyan and violet highlights, high contrast, sharp edges, tech-noir aesthetic, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, minimalist background.
